title: achnatherum pelliotii
intro: Achnatherum pelliotii, also known as Pelliot's needlegrass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat wounds, infections, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Achnatherum pelliotii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Achnatherum pelliotii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
